title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: We are seeking a highly skilled Backend Engineer to design and implement scalable APIs and cloud-native applications.
requirements: 5+ years of experience in frontend development, with at least 2 years in a senior or lead role
Strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript (ES6+)
Hands-on experience with modern frameworks such as React.js (preferred), Angular, or Vue.js
Experience with state management libraries (Redux, Zustand, or Context API)
Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and asynchronous data handling
Knowledge of responsive design, cross-browser compatibility, and accessibility standards (WCAG)
Proficiency with build tools and bundlers (Webpack, Vite, Babel, etc.)
Experience with version control (Git) and CI/CD pipelines
Familiarity with testing frameworks (Jest, React Testing Library, Cypress)
Ability to mentor junior engineers and conduct code reviews
responsibilities: Lead the design and implementation of scalable, high-performance frontend applications
Collaborate with designers, backend engineers, and product managers to deliver seamless user experiences
Write clean, maintainable, and reusable code following best practices
Conduct code reviews and provide mentorship to junior developers
Optimize applications for maximum speed and scalability
Ensure the technical feasibility of UI/UX designs
Stay up to date with emerging frontend trends and propose adoption where valuable
Contribute to architectural decisions and guide the team on best frontend practices
education: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field
skills: CSS-in-JS libraries (Styled Components, Emotion, Tailwind CSS)

recentUpdates.message: Role opened due to team expansion in cloud services division.
